mapper.select: SELECT id, action, target, target_id, detail, operator, created_at FROM operation_log ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, action, target, target_id, detail, operator, created_at FROM operation_log ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, action, target, target_id, detail, operator, created_at FROM operation_log WHERE target = #{target} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_log (action, target, target_id, detail, operator, created_at) VALUES (#{action}, #{target}, #{targetId}, #{detail}, #{operator}, #{createdAt})
